channel.title: Diabetes on Jeffreys Ruminations
channel.description: Recent content in Diabetes on Jeffreys Ruminations

item.title: Life Updates and Musings
item.description: (includes updates from May 25, 2014 - JER) I’ve gotten this website to a functional level, so I guess it is time to do an update on what is going on in my life right now. It’s been a busy time, but I’ve been enjoying myself working on some interesting projects at work. Life is different in the non-engineering world and I think it would have been better if I had changed a few years earlier than I did.
